# `draw.horizontalRay`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `lines`
> **Wire kind:** `horizontal-ray`

Draw a horizontal ray starting at `anchor` and extending to the
right edge of the viewport at constant price.

## Anchors

`anchor` — one `WorldPoint`

Anchor count: 1.

## Signature

```ts
function horizontalRay(anchor: WorldPoint, opts?: LineDrawStyle): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.horizontalRay(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.horizontalRay demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.horizontalRay(
                { time: bar.time, price: bar.close },
                { color: "#10b981" },
            );
        },
    });
```
